message:
feat(inference): add KL surprisal, BMA, beta-Stacy, and graph smoothing modules

- Fix test_severity_from_tail_bound boundary value in kl_surprisal.rs
- Add beta_stacy module for lifetime modeling with beta-Stacy process
- Add bma module for Bayesian model averaging of posteriors
- Add graph_smoothing module for belief propagation on process trees
- Add KL surprisal exports to inference mod
- Fix bocpd edge cases and add ledger enhancements

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
